title: Signal Coverage
description: Output of Stage 2 (Translate) — maps simulation signals to production equivalents. Consumed by Stage 3 (Generate) and Stage 5 (Validate).

prod_access_path.description: Go code to access this signal (e.g., endpoint.GetMetrics().WaitingQueueSize)

staleness_window_ms.description: Staleness window in milliseconds (0 for v1 approximate-scorer signals)

mapped.description: True if signal has a production equivalent

normalization.description: Normalization action to apply. Must be one of the three recognized action keys from algorithm_summary.json normalization_note pattern.

notes.description: Additional mapping notes (e.g., structural semantic gap, double-counting risk)

fidelity_provisional.description: Copied from algorithm_summary.json signals[].fidelity_provisional when true. When true, PR5 empirical validation is required before the fidelity rating can be considered stable.

unmapped_signals.description: Signal names that could not be mapped to production equivalents

commit_hash.description: llm-d-inference-scheduler submodule commit hash at mapping time

coverage_complete.description: True if all signals are mapped (unmapped_signals is empty)
